Reviews.Author: 17qb2vj1g4
Reviews.Comment: In my opinion, it's the best executor since Zenith went out of business, especially with its Windows 10 support. I have never seen such fast attachment and injection. The only downside is that there is no Lifetime option.

Categories.Comment: Supports every script with real UNC and sUNC percentages.
It has never slowed down my Roblox process. Only the script you execute will affect performance.
It offers instant script injection and very fast auto-attachment. There are no bugs or crashes from Seliware.
The UI is still in development. The old design looked like a scam, but it was simple before version 2.0.0. While the new design is nice, it's not as good as Zenith's UI was.
It's usually up to date, but the update to version 2.0.0 took a long time. Based on my limited experience, updates could be made faster.
